game_name: Bubsy in: Claws Encounters of the Furred Kind

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic introduced in first level
Reward loop - 500 collected grants extra life
Added after playtesting feedback; optional exploration
Replaced catnip mechanic; environmental hazard progression

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced side-scrolling action with intended balance between Sonic speed and Mario depth

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Underground tube ways and secret paths accessible to observant players
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden paths and optional routes integrated into level design

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible introduction with basic jumping on Woolies and yarn collection
notable_spikes: Progressive enemy density and hazard complexity across 16-level progression

notable_level_patterns.description: Level 1 establishes underground tube ways as optional content. Playtester feedback led to expanded secret path design throughout game.
Banana peel hazards replace original catnip mechanic (censorship adjustment). Integrated as environmental obstacles in level progression.
Stray yarn balls scattered through levels as collectibles. Reward milestone of 500 collected grants extra life.
